name: gallery_examples
title: Vega Gallery Examples Registry
description: A cross-gallery registry that maps Vega, Vega-Lite, and Altair gallery examples to the datasets they use. Any collection of examples can publish an index conforming to this schema to join the federated registry.

fields.name: gallery_name
fields.description: Name of the gallery this example belongs to

fields.name: example_url
fields.description: URL to rendered example in the gallery

fields.name: spec_url
fields.description: URL to source specification or code

fields.name: categories
fields.description: Tags or categories for the example (e.g., 'Bar Charts', 'Interactive')

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional description of what the example demonstrates (may be null)

fields.name: datasets
fields.description: Dataset names referencing resource.name in this package
